#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events')

## EventStreamReader Class

Reads events from the actor state store and rehydrates aggregate state\.
Supports snapshot\-aware rehydration: when a snapshot is provided, only tail events
after the snapshot sequence are loaded \(Story 3\.10\)\.
Created per\-call \(not DI\-registered\) \-\- same pattern as IdempotencyChecker and TenantValidator\.

```csharp
public class EventStreamReader : Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.IEventStreamReader
```

Reads events from the actor state store and rehydrates aggregate state\.
Supports snapshot\-aware rehydration: when a snapshot is provided, only tail events
after the snapshot sequence are loaded \(Story 3\.10\)\.
Created per\-call \(not DI\-registered\) \-\- same pattern as IdempotencyChecker and TenantValidator\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventStreamReader.RehydrateAsync(Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity,Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.SnapshotRecord)'></a>

## EventStreamReader\.RehydrateAsync\(AggregateIdentity, SnapshotRecord\) Method

Rehydrates aggregate state by loading events from the event stream\.
When a snapshot is provided, loads only tail events after the snapshot sequence\.
When no snapshot is provided, performs a full replay from sequence 1\.

```csharp
public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.RehydrationResult?> RehydrateAsync(Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity identity, Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.SnapshotRecord? snapshot=null);
```
